info.title: ThinClaw Gateway API
info.description: The v1 mobile contract of the ThinClaw web gateway: chat, threads, approvals, read-only jobs, and gateway status. Streaming events are delivered over `/api/chat/events` (SSE) or `/api/chat/ws` (WebSocket); both carry the `SseEvent` component schema.

202.description: Interrupt submitted to the agent loop

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

400.description: Unknown approval action or malformed request id

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream of agent events. Each `data:` line is a JSON-encoded `SseEvent` discriminated by its `type` field. The stream has no replay: after a reconnect, clients must reconcile missed turns via `GET /api/chat/history`. Browser EventSource clients may pass the bearer token as a `token` query parameter; native clients must use the Authorization header.

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

200.description: Turns for the requested (or active) thread

400.description: Malformed thread id or pagination cursor

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

404.description: Thread not found or not visible to this identity

202.description: Message accepted for async processing; results stream over SSE/WS

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

200.description: New side thread created and persisted

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token
Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

403.description: The pinned assistant thread cannot be deleted

404.description: Thread not found or not visible to this identity

200.description: Assistant thread plus regular conversation threads

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

get.description: WebSocket upgrade for bidirectional chat. Client frames are JSON-encoded `WsClientMessage`; server frames are JSON-encoded `WsServerMessage` (SSE events in an envelope plus `pong`).

requestBody.description: Not a conventional request body: after the 101 upgrade, the client sends `WsClientMessage` frames.

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

200.description: Connection counts, uptime, cost/budget usage, runtime routing, and channel setup state

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

get.description:
Returns `503` (so load balancers route away from a broken instance) unless
the database is reachable within 2s *and* at least one LLM provider is
configured. A deployment with no persistence configured (`store == None`) is
treated as DB-ready. The pure decision lives in
`thinclaw_gateway::web::status::readiness_response` (unit-tested there).

200.description: Gateway is ready (database reachable, LLM provider configured)

503.description: Gateway is degraded; load balancers should route away

200.description: Direct and sandbox jobs owned by the caller

401.description: Missing or invalid gateway bearer token
Missing or invalid gateway bearer token
Missing or invalid gateway bearer token

404.description: Job not found or not visible to this identity

thread_id.description: Thread that owns the pending approval (so the agent loop finds the right session).

has_more.description: Whether there are older messages available.

oldest_timestamp.description: Cursor for the next page (ISO8601 timestamp of the oldest message returned).

ModelInfo.description: Information about an available LLM model.

oneOf.description:
Extended thinking / chain-of-thought reasoning from the LLM.
Sent alongside the Response event when extended thinking is enabled.

Agent requests a credential; the browser renders an inline masked-input
card that POSTs the value straight to `/api/repo-projects/credentials`.
Carries NO secret value — only the name to store under and a reason.
Extension activation status change (WASM channels).
Channel connectivity status change (channel came online/offline/degraded).
Routine lifecycle event (started, completed, failed).
Cost budget alert (approaching or exceeding daily/hourly limits).
Canvas / A2UI panel update pushed to the frontend.

Agent completed its bootstrap ritual (BOOTSTRAP.md deleted).
Frontend should update bootstrapNeeded → false.
The pinned assistant thread (always present after first load).

ToolArtifact.description: Optional rich tool artifacts that can be rendered alongside the JSON result.

oneOf.description: Send a chat message to the agent.
Approve or deny a pending tool execution.

thread_id.description: Thread that owns the pending approval.

oneOf.description: Submit an auth token for an extension (bypasses message pipeline).
Cancel an in-progress auth flow.
Client heartbeat ping.
Protocol version handshake (sent on connect).
Set a configuration value on the orchestrator.
Set a secret on the orchestrator's keychain.
Request the list of available models.

WsClientMessage.description: Message sent by a WebSocket client to the server.

oneOf.description: An SSE-style event forwarded over WebSocket.

data.description: The event payload as a JSON value.

event_type.description: The event sub-type (response, thinking, tool_started, etc.)

oneOf.description: Server heartbeat pong.
Error message.
Protocol version info (response to client's Version message).

compatible.description: Whether the client version is compatible.

oneOf.description: Result of a config_set operation.
Result of a secret_set operation.
List of available models.

WsServerMessage.description: Message sent by the server to a WebSocket client.

gateway_token.description: Gateway bearer token (GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN or, once the device-identity layer ships, a per-device `tcd_` token).
